intro: Book a waxing treatment and pedicure together in one visit and enjoy a discounted combined price. Two treatments, one appointment, no travel stress.

bundles.name: Hollywood + Classic Pedicure
bundles.description: Our bestselling combination — a full Hollywood wax followed by a relaxing Classic Pedicure. Everything you need, beautifully done, in one visit.

bundles.name: Hollywood + Luxury Pedicure
bundles.description: Treat yourself to the ultimate home beauty experience. A Hollywood wax combined with our indulgent Luxury Pedicure — massage, heated mask, and gel polish included.

bundles.name: Brazilian + Gel Pedicure
bundles.description: A clean Brazilian wax paired with a long-lasting gel pedicure. Leave feeling polished from head to toe.

bundles.name: Full Legs + Classic Pedicure
bundles.description: Smooth legs and beautiful toes — everything you need to feel confident barefoot. Perfect before a holiday or special occasion.
